User.title: User
User.description: User profile definitions and business context

name.description: Display name of the store owner

category.description: The category niche of the business catalog

email.description: The email address of the business owner

phoneNumber.description: Optional phone number of the owner

darkModeEnabled.description: Whether Dark Mode is active in the user interface

employees.description: Optional list of registered employees under this store

Sale.title: Sale
Sale.description: A single logged sales transaction ledgers entry

itemDescription.description: Product name description from stock catalog

originalAmount.description: The total purchase monetary price before discount

description.description: An optional private comment or annotation regarding this specific transaction

InventoryItem.title: InventoryItem
InventoryItem.description: A product available in the store catalog

imageUrl.description: Optional customized product image web URL

profitMargin.description: The item target profit margin percentage

Client.title: Client
Client.description: A registered customer of the store

cellphone.description: Client's cellular phone or whatsapp number

lastPurchaseTimestamp.description: Timestamp metric in milliseconds for chrono tracking

lastPurchaseAmount.description: The amount spent in the last purchase transaction

InstagramProgress.title: InstagramProgress
InstagramProgress.description: State tracker tracking the gamified learning trilha progress

storeNiche.description: Configured category niche of the Instagram profile

currentTaskIndex.description: Current active task index from 0 to 9

InstagramFeedback.title: InstagramFeedback
InstagramFeedback.description: A feedback item delivered by our AI Coach mentorship

feedback.description: The AI structured feedback markdown string

EmailToUid.title: EmailToUid
EmailToUid.description: Cross-reference mapping from a sanitized email address to the corresponding auth UID

uid.description: The unique user identifier matching the registered auth account

/usuarios/{userId}/sales/{saleId}.description: Subcollection storing sales logged by user

/usuarios/{userId}/inventory/{itemId}.description: Subcollection representing catalog products of user

/usuarios/{userId}/instagram/progress.description: Global settings document for the Instagram gamified progress state

/usuarios/{userId}/instagramFeedbacks/{f.description: Log history of feedbacks created for this user

/email_to_uid/{safeEmail}.description: Global mappings indexing sanitized emails to target user profiles
